name: Midland Community Bank
description_short: Midland Community Bank is a full-service bank offering checking, savings, loans, and mobile banking with FDIC insurance protection and online loan applications.
description_long:
Midland Community Bank (MCB) operates as a traditional community bank with NMLS# 417295, serving customers through physical locations in Kincaid and Taylorville, Illinois. The bank maintains an active online presence at mcbbank.net and provides comprehensive deposit services backed by FDIC insurance coverage up to $250,000 per depositor per account category. MCB has modernized its service delivery to meet contemporary banking expectations while maintaining local community banking roots.

The bank offers a range of products and services including checking and savings accounts, loan applications (personal, home, and other lending products), mobile banking via their MCB On The Go app, online banking platforms, check reordering services, and investment services consultation. They provide surcharge-free ATM access and facilitate account transfers through their online switch kit. The institution emphasizes accessibility, offering both traditional in-branch services and digital banking solutions for convenience.

MCB distinguishes itself through its free mobile banking application available on both iOS and Android platforms, which includes features like mobile check deposit, fund transfers, bill pay, account opening, and real-time balance monitoring. The bank's routing number (071108782) and established NMLS registration indicate a fully regulated financial institution. Their emphasis on customer support through multiple contact channels (phone numbers for Kincaid and Taylorville locations, email support) reflects commitment to personalized service typical of community banks.

As a regional community bank, MCB serves customers seeking traditional banking services with modern digital conveniences. The honest assessment is that MCB appears to be a solid community banking option for customers in Illinois seeking straightforward deposit, lending, and basic investment services, though the website provides limited detailed information about specific rates, fee structures, or comprehensive product comparisons that might help consumers make informed decisions.
services: Mobile banking app (MCB On The Go) with check deposit
pros: Free mobile banking app (MCB On The Go) with check deposit, transfers, bill pay, and account opening features
FDIC deposit insurance coverage up to $250,000 per depositor per account category
24/7 mobile banking access through smartphone and tablet apps available on Apple Store and Google Play
Multiple convenient contact methods including dedicated phone lines for Kincaid (217-237-4324) and Taylorville (217-287-7255) locations
Online loan applications for streamlined personal, home, and other loan products
Established financial institution with NMLS# 417295 and routing number 071108782
cons: Website provides limited detail on specific interest rates, APYs for accounts, or loan terms
Geographic limitation appears to be primarily Illinois-based with only two mentioned physical locations (Kincaid and Taylorville)
Fee structures and account minimums not disclosed on website
No mention of additional services like investment advisory, wealth management, or business banking products
Limited information about customer support hours and response times for digital inquiries
best_for: Illinois residents in the Kincaid and Taylorville areas seeking community bank services with modern digital banking
Customers who prioritize free mobile banking features including mobile check deposit and bill pay functionality
Borrowers interested in applying for personal, home, or other loans through an online application process
Depositors seeking FDIC-insured accounts with straightforward banking services from an established local institution
diagnosis: Midland Community Bank is best for Illinois residents in the Kincaid and Taylorville areas seeking traditional community banking with modern mobile conveniences, FDIC protection, and straightforward loan products. The main caveat is that the website lacks detailed rate and fee information, making it necessary to contact the bank directly for specific product terms and pricing.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
